approximate_counts.note: All counts are approximate and for cross-pass comparison only.

notes: EPUB XHTML was used as the primary text source. Laryngeals split across inline italic/subscript markup were normalized to Unicode subscript digits where detected. No inline image-glyph files were detected; EPUB figure/table/logo/cover images were copied from OEBPS/images/ without re-encoding or visual inference. Image-only figure/table content remains non-textual except for exact captions/labels present in XHTML.
